bucket.description: The name of the bucket that contains the managed folder.

name.description: The name of the managed folder expressed as a path. Must include trailing '/'. For example, `example_dir/example_dir2/`.

force_destroy.description: objects. If a non-empty managed folder is deleted, any objects within the folder will remain in a simulated folder with the same name.
force_destroy.rationale: Force destroy can lead to unintentional data deletion
